message:
⚡ Lazy-load Security and ClusterAdmin routes in App.tsx (#10215)

Convert two non-primary routes from eager static imports to safeLazy():
- Security: not the landing page, no justification for eager import
- ClusterAdmin: heavy route, not visited on initial load

Dashboard and Login/AuthCallback remain eagerly imported (landing page
and OAuth safety respectively). Clusters stays eager per its existing
startTransition comment.

Fixes #10213

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
